title: Check Digit Modulo
text: Check Digit Modulo The check digit algorithm used for checking data entered in the field. Value Description None No check digit algorithm is used (Default). 10 Sets the MOD(10) field syntax code. The modulo 10 algorithm is used. 11 Sets the MOD(11) field syntax code. The modulo 11 algorithm is used. 34 Sets the MOD(34) field syntax code. The modulo 34 algorithm is used. Applies To Field Syntax Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
